---
title: "Selection of Integration Weight using Bayesian Optimization"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 6
    number_sections: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Selection of Integration Weight using Bayesian Optimization}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
bibliography: references.bib
---
